one_time_description: Corrections aux exercices antérieurs liées à l'analyse des états financiers des années antérieures des différents bailleurs de fonds (404 264 $ fonds non utilisés Santé Canada et 2 780 357 $ autres bailleurs de fonds)
economic_notes: GBEs include: Scierie Opitciwan (55% owned), Services Forestiers Opitciwan (99.99%), Épicerie Opitciwonok (99.99%), Développement Économique Opitciwan inc. (100%), Station Service Opitciwan (99.99%), Opitciwan Télécom (99.99%), Société de Télécommunications Atikamekw-Cri S.E.C. (16.67%), Onimiskiw Opitciwan (99.99%). New investment of 6,179,123 in Onimiskiw Opitciwan during the year.
notes: Audit qualified due to non-compliance with SP 3280 (asset retirement obligations) - Conseil did not identify or measure ARO liabilities for 2024 and 2023. Financial statements are combined (Fonds d'exploitation + Fonds d'habitation). Eight GBEs accounted for under modified equity method, not consolidated. Scierie Opitciwan recorded a large loss of 6,538,143 in 2024, significantly impacting the negative equity method income line. New GBE Onimiskiw Opitciwan received 6,179,123 capital contribution. Prior period corrections of 2,376,093 applied to opening accumulated surplus. TCA net book value is sum of Fonds exploitation (74,726,760) plus Fonds habitation (10,583,959). total_government_transfers calculated as SAC 100,112,158 + SCHL 3,812,731 + Autres fédéral 3,930,402 + Provincial 8,177,112 = 116,032,403 less revenues reportés applied proportionately; osr calculation is approximate. Deferred revenue of 26,036,236 plus fonds non utilisés SAC 18,629,356 and Santé Canada 5,425,164 shown separately on balance sheet. No segment expense breakdown by program available in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (86.65%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
